01-notification.title: Notification Card
01-notification.description: A status-driven card with a badge, body copy, and a footer action. Caller controls read state.

02-settings-panel.title: Settings Panel
02-settings-panel.description: Card used as a settings section with a list of toggle rows and save/cancel actions in the footer.

03-task-progress.title: Task Progress
03-task-progress.description: Card displaying a checklist with a progress bar in the header to summarize completion state.
